# Define retirement dashboard in finance area

## Summary

Design a dedicated retirement dashboard within the finance area that combines pension insurance information with projected capital income.

## Why

Users need a focused retirement-oriented view, not only isolated finance and portfolio metrics.

## Scope

- define dashboard goals for retirement planning and monitoring
- display estimated pension income
- display guaranteed pension income
- display projected dividend income
- display projected interest income
- define how pension and capital income views are combined meaningfully

## Acceptance Criteria

- the retirement dashboard purpose is documented
- pension-related outputs are explicitly listed
- projected capital income outputs are explicitly listed
- the result is specific enough to drive implementation issues for data model, calculations, and UI
